title: Forbidden Systems
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Forbidden Systems''' was a region of the [[Galaxy|galaxy]] that was cut off from [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] by an [[Asteroid field|asteroid belt]], en route to [[Ophuchi]]. It contained the planet [[Yavin Prime|Yavin]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Forbidden Systems originally appears in the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]. The [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]] eliminates the term, assimilating it into the [[Great Rift]].
